final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a technical documentation / tutorial aesthetic — exact visual style is yours
Composition: must include 4 clearly numbered steps (1, 2, 3, 4) in sequential layout
Subject: must include Docker container, Hermes deployment, and GLMCodingPlan integration as the core workflow
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a professional tech documentation direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step numbers "1", "2", "3", "4" clearly labeled; must include "Hermes", "Docker", "GLMCodingPlan" as key terms
Constraints: must preserve 4-step structure; each step must have visual illustration + brief explanatory text
Avoid:
